general_conference_talks.title: General Conference
Contents
Saturday Morning Session  The Saturday morning session of the 196th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 4–5, 2026.
Dallin H. Oaks  Introduction  President Oaks explains that in a solemn assembly, members of the Church vote to sustain members of the First Presidency and the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles.
D. Todd Christofferson  Solemn Assembly  In a solemn assembly, President Christofferson presents the names of the First Presidency and Quorum of the Twelve Apostles for sustaining votes.

Patrick Kearon  About His Business  Elder Kearon teaches that callings from the Lord are tailor-made for our growth and that when we respond to a call, we don’t merely fill an assignment but join the Saviour in His redeeming work.
Kristin M. Yee  Ministering—“That Ye Love One Another; as I Have Loved You”  Sister Yee describes how Jesus Christ ministered and testifies of the blessings of ministering in His way.
David A. Bednar  All Who Have Endured Valiantly  Elder Bednar teaches that enduring valiantly to the end means becoming more like Christ as we practice charity throughout our lives.
Michael John U. Teh  Follow the Prophet; He Knows the Way  Elder Teh teaches that following the teachings and example of prophets, seers, and revelators can help us come closer to Jesus Christ.
Jorge T. Becerra  Tithing—Putting God First  Elder Becerra teaches that we can put God first by obeying the law of tithing.
Henry B. Eyring  Prayers for Peace  President Eyring teaches that turning to Heavenly Father in fervent prayer will bring peace and abiding support.
Saturday Afternoon Session  The Saturday afternoon session of the 196th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 4–5, 2026.

D. Todd Christofferson  Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers  President Christofferson presents the General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints for a ...
Jared B. Larson  Church Auditing Department Report, 2025  Jared B. Larson shares the Church Auditing Department Report for 2025.
Gary E. Stevenson  Lost Luggage, Redeemed Souls  Elder Stevenson teaches that we can help each other return safely to God as we serve in ministering assignments and nurture the rising generation.
Eduardo F. Ortega  Christ—Author and Finisher of Our Faith  Elder Ortega teaches that becoming a lifelong disciple of Jesus Christ is a process of daily personal and spiritual events.
Wan-Liang Wu  “I Will Give Away All My Sins to Know Thee”  Elder Wu teaches that coming unto Christ is more than just learning of Christ. It includes faith, repentance, and conversion.
David J. Wunderli  Jesus Christ Is Not Our Burden; He Is Our Relief  Brother Wunderli teaches that Jesus Christ brings relief and eases our burdens.

Gérald Caussé  Love All; Love Each  Elder Caussé teaches that as disciples of Jesus Christ, we bear witness of Him whenever we share His love with all around us—and help it take root in each person we meet.
Brian J. Holmes  Jesus Christ Is the Way  Elder Holmes teaches that the only way to eternal life is to have faith in Jesus Christ and follow Him and His servants on the covenant path.
Clement M. Matswagothata  He Knows You by Name  Elder Matswagothata teaches that the Savior knows us by name and will guide us through every season of life.
Ulisses Soares  Jesus Christ—the True Vine  Elder Soares explains how Jesus Christ is like a vine that gives us spiritual nourishment as we choose to abide in Him.
Sunday Morning Session  The Sunday morning session of the 196th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 4–5, 2026.

Dieter F. Uchtdorf  Encounter at the Empty Tomb  President Uchtdorf teaches about the women who first saw the empty tomb and bore witness of Christ’s Resurrection and invites all of us to have a similar spiritual encounter and testimony.

Emily Belle Freeman  Best Days and Worst Days  President Freeman testifies that on our best days and on our worst days, we can receive strength as we walk with Christ and hold fast to His eternal truths.
Pedro X. Larreal  I Feel My Savior’s Love  Elder Larreal teaches that the sacrament is a reminder of the great love Christ has for us.
Edward B. Rowe  Choose Jesus Christ as Your Guide  Elder Rowe teaches that Jesus Christ can guide us through life’s journey as we listen to His Spirit.
Ronald A. Rasband  He Is Risen  Elder Rasband shares the accounts of Jesus Christ’s Resurrection in the Bible and Book of Mormon, along with His own witness as an Apostle.
Dale G. Renlund  Because of Jesus Christ  Elder Renlund teaches that focusing on Jesus Christ and His Atonement will bring joy and clarity to our lives.
Thierry K. Mutombo  The Joy of a Covenant Relationship with God  Elder Mutombo describes how Heavenly Father extends His love to us through the Atonement of Jesus Christ and our covenants with Him.
Alan R. Walker  A Peculiar Treasure  Elder Walker teaches that we can be a peculiar treasure to the Lord if we obey His voice and keep His covenant.
Dallin H. Oaks  Alive in Christ  President Oaks teaches us to avoid contention, to be peacemakers, and to strive to be holy.
Sunday Afternoon Session  The Sunday afternoon session of the 196th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 4–5, 2026.
D. Todd Christofferson  The Character of Christ  President Christofferson teaches that emulating the character of Christ will help us become who we need to be.
Chi Hong (Sam) Wong  Remember, Remember  Using five scriptures from the Book of Mormon, Elder Wong shares what God wants us to remember.
Aaron T. Hall  I Glory in My Jesus  Elder Hall teaches about the mercy, love, and saving power of Jesus Christ.
Susan H. Porter  “Here Am I, Send Me”  President Porter teaches that, like the boy who shared his loaves and fishes, children can make a difference.
Neil L. Andersen  Eternal Marriage Is an Eternal Journey  Elder Andersen teaches about the responsibilities and blessings of the marriage covenant.

Quentin L. Cook  Keys, Covenants, and Easter  Elder Cook teaches that the appearance of the Savior to the Prophet Joseph Smith and the keys committed by Moses, Elias, and Elijah are central to the Restoration of the gospel of Jesus Christ.
Taniela B. Wakolo  Come unto Christ—Together  Elder Wakolo teaches that as we are faithful and patient in our discipleship, the Lord will fulfill His promises.
Gerrit W. Gong  ’Tis Eastertide: No One Walks Alone  Elder Gong teaches that as we faithfully keep our covenants, we will come to know Jesus Christ and He will abide with us.
Dallin H. Oaks  Closing Remarks  President Oaks teaches that as we focus on Jesus Christ and study the teachings from conference, we will receive personal revelation and guidance.
General Conference
Contents
Saturday Morning Session  The Saturday morning session of the 195th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 5–6, 2025.

Dallin H. Oaks  Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers  President Oaks presents the General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints for a sustaining vote.
Jared B. Larson  Church Auditing Department Report, 2024  Jared B. Larson reads the Church auditing report.
Jeffrey R. Holland  As a Little Child  President Holland teaches the importance of becoming like a little child in order to enter the kingdom of God.
Camille N. Johnson  Spiritually Whole in Him  President Johnson teaches that we can be spiritually whole as we wait for physical and emotional healing.
Ronald A. Rasband  Right Before Our Eyes  Noting that the Lord is hastening His work, Elder Rasband recounts the Church’s growth in members, missions, temples, and education efforts.
Quentin L. Cook  The Atonement of Jesus Christ Provides the Ultimate Rescue  Elder Cook uses the example of the handcart pioneers to teach that Jesus Christ will rescue us from the storms of life.
Ricardo P. Giménez  My Love for the Savior Is My “Why”  Elder Giménez teaches about the importance of connecting our actions with our love for Jesus Christ.
Henry B. Eyring  “Draw Near unto Me”  President Eyring teaches that we can draw near to the Savior through praying, listening for guidance, and serving others.
Saturday Afternoon Session  The Saturday afternoon session of the 195th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 5–6, 2025.
Neil L. Andersen  Cherishing Life  Elder Andersen teaches about the sanctity of life and the importance of nurturing and protecting it.
Steven J. Lund  Divine Authority, Sublime Young Men  President Lund teaches about the duties of Aaronic Priesthood holders and the blessings of their service.
S. Mark Palmer  “Return unto Me … That I May Heal You”  Elder Palmer teaches that it is never too late to return to Jesus Christ and His gospel.
Sandino Roman  Faith: A Bond of Trust and Loyalty  Elder Roman defines faith as trust in and loyalty to Jesus Christ and teaches how we can nurture and increase our faith.
Dale G. Renlund  Personal Preparation to Meet the Savior  Elder Renlund uses lessons from three of the Savior’s parables to teach how we can prepare for the Second Coming.
Hans T. Boom  True to the Faith That Our Parents Have Cherished  Elder Boom teaches us to find strength in the faith and testimonies of our parents and ancestors.

Dieter F. Uchtdorf  “By This All Will Know That You Are My Disciples”  Elder Uchtdorf teaches that our love for others shows our discipleship and that we can find belonging and unity in Christ’s Church.
Saturday Evening Session  The Saturday evening session of the 195th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 5–6, 2025.

Gary E. Stevenson  And We Talk of Christ  Elder Stevenson teaches that as we accept the invitations from Church leaders to more intentionally celebrate Easter, we will find that our bond with Jesus Christ grows stronger.
Amy A. Wright  Thou Art the Christ  Sister Wright teaches about the importance of helping our children believe in Jesus Christ and become more like Him.
James R. Rasband  The Plan of Mercy  Elder Rasband teaches that God is merciful and the plan of salvation is a plan of mercy.
Our Heavenly Guidance System  Sergio R. Vargas

D. Todd Christofferson  Worship  Elder D. Todd Christofferson teaches about the actions that constitute worship; attitudes related to worship; the exclusivity of our worship; and the need to emulate the Beings we worship.
Sunday Morning Session  The Sunday morning session of the 195th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 5–6, 2025.

David A. Bednar  The Times of Restitution of All Things  Elder Bednar summarizes elements of the Restoration of Jesus Christ’s gospel and Church, including the First Vision, the Book of Mormon, and the priesthood.
Steven D. Shumway  Participate to Prepare for Christ’s Return  Elder Shumway teaches that callings and other ways of serving in the Church help us grow and prepare us to stand before the Savior.

Tamara W. Runia  Your Repentance Doesn’t Burden Jesus Christ; It Brightens His Joy  Sister Runia teaches that our worth doesn’t change when we make mistakes and that the Savior understands us and wants us to choose Him again and again.
Gérald Caussé  Compensating Blessings  Bishop Caussé teaches that limitations and challenges will not prevent God’s children from receiving the Lord’s promised blessings.

Gerrit W. Gong  Eternity’s Great Gifts: Jesus Christ’s Atonement, Resurrection, Restoration  Elder Gong teaches that Jesus Christ understands us perfectly in our grief and in our joy and provides us with the gifts of atonement, resurrection, and rest...
John A. McCune  Joy Through Covenant Discipleship  Elder McCune teaches the joy we can find by making and keeping covenants with Heavenly Father and following Jesus Christ.
Dallin H. Oaks  Divine Helps for Mortality  President Oaks describes various ways Heavenly Father helps us during our mortal journeys, as part of His plan for our eternal progress.
Sunday Afternoon Session  The Sunday afternoon session of the 195th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 5–6, 2025.
Ulisses Soares  Reverence for Sacred Things  Elder Soares teaches that having reverence for sacred things will bring gratitude, revelation, and joy.
Michael B. Strong  Charity—a Sign of True Discipleship  Elder Strong teaches principles that can help us deepen our discipleship of Jesus Christ and become like Him.
Scott D. Whiting  Beware the Second Temptation  Elder Whiting teaches that we should resist the temptation to hide our sins and should instead seek divine help.
Christopher H. Kim  Harden Not Your Heart  Elder Kim teaches that we can soften our hearts through repentance, humility, and trust in the Lord.
Patrick Kearon  Receive His Gift  Elder Kearon invites us to receive Heavenly Father’s gifts to us, especially the gift of His Son and the truth that we are God’s children.
Benjamin M. Z. Tai  The Love of God  Elder Tai teaches about how we can feel the love of God and Jesus Christ in our daily lives.
Russell M. Nelson  Confidence in the Presence of God  President Nelson teaches that we can have confidence in the presence of God as we fill our lives with charity and virtue.
